wine_bars_late.name: Hotel Restaurant Weinhaus Lindenwirt
wine_bars_late.wine_program: A traditional Drosselgasse Weinhaus pouring Rheingau Riesling, Spaetburgunder and Sekt by the glass through long Drosselgasse evenings of brass music and tavern food
wine_bars_late.tip: The Drosselgasse runs loud until midnight in summer; grab a riverside-facing courtyard table for the calmer end of the Lindenwirt's terrace.
wine_bars_late.description: Traditional Drosselgasse Weinhaus and hotel in Ruedesheim, pouring Rheingau Riesling, Spaetburgunder and Sekt by the glass through long brass-band evenings under chestnut trees.

wine_bars_late.name: Breuer's Ruedesheimer Schloss
wine_bars_late.wine_program: A Drosselgasse-area Weingut Georg Breuer flagship hotel-restaurant with the family's Berg Schlossberg and Berg Roseneck Rieslings poured by the glass into the evening
wine_bars_late.tip: Order the Breuer Berg Schlossberg trocken by the glass; it is the cleanest read of the family's steep-slope Ruedesheim style.
wine_bars_late.description: Weingut Georg Breuer's flagship hotel-restaurant in Ruedesheim, pouring the family's steep-slope Berg Schlossberg and Berg Roseneck Rieslings by the glass into the evening.

wine_bars_late.name: Hotel Kronenschloesschen Hattenheim
wine_bars_late.wine_program: The wine bar and restaurant of a Belle Epoque manor hotel in Hattenheim, pouring an extensive Rheingau-led cellar with the village's classic VDP estates by the glass
wine_bars_late.tip: Settle in the garden of the Belle Epoque manor at dusk; the wine list leans on Hattenheim and Eltville VDP estates a few streets away.
wine_bars_late.description: Belle Epoque manor hotel in Hattenheim with a wine bar and restaurant pouring an extensive Rheingau-led cellar, focused on the village's classic VDP estates by the glass.

candle_lit.name: Ratskeller Eltville
candle_lit.wine_program: A historic Eltville town-hall cellar Weinstube pouring Rheingau Riesling and Spaetburgunder by the glass in a low-vaulted, candle-lit room beside the Burg Eltville
candle_lit.tip: Sit in the vaulted back room and order a Rheingau flight; the cellar pairs well with the smoked-trout and pork-belly menu.
candle_lit.description: Low-vaulted Eltville town-hall cellar Weinstube pouring Rheingau Riesling and Spaetburgunder by the glass beside the Burg Eltville.

candle_lit.name: Klosterschaenke Kloster Eberbach
candle_lit.address: Kloster Eberbach 1, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
candle_lit.wine_program: The inner-court restaurant and Weinstube of the 12th-century Cistercian abbey, pouring the Hessische Staatsweingueter range including Steinberg and the Assmannshaeuser Spaetburgunder by the glass
candle_lit.tip: Sit in the Klosterschaenke's inner courtyard at dusk and order the Steinberg Riesling beside the Assmannshaeuser Spaetburgunder.
candle_lit.description: Inner-court restaurant and Weinstube of the 12th-century Kloster Eberbach abbey, pouring the Hessische Staatsweingueter range including Steinberg Riesling.

lounges.name: Schloss Vollrads Gutsschaenke
lounges.wine_program: The estate Gutsschaenke restaurant and lounge of the moated Schloss Vollrads, pouring the Schloss Vollrads dry Riesling range across early-evening seatings on the castle terrace
lounges.tip: Reserve a terrace table at sunset; the castle's moated walls and vineyard views are the headline of the early-evening lounge.
lounges.description: Estate restaurant and lounge of the moated Schloss Vollrads in Oestrich-Winkel, pouring the estate's dry Riesling range on the castle terrace into the evening.

lounges.name: Schloss Johannisberg Restaurant and Terrace
lounges.wine_program: The Schloss Johannisberg restaurant and terrace overlooking the south-facing monopole slope, pouring the estate Riesling range with a long-running early-evening service
lounges.tip: Time the terrace seating for sunset over the Rhine; the south-slope view and the estate's colour-capsule Rieslings are the headline.
lounges.description: Restaurant and terrace of Schloss Johannisberg, pouring the estate Riesling range overlooking the south-facing monopole slope into the evening.

late_tastings.name: Kloster Eberbach Vinothek
late_tastings.address: Kloster Eberbach 1, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
late_tastings.wine_program: The Hessische Staatsweingueter vinothek inside the 12th-century Kloster Eberbach abbey, with self-pour and counter tastings of the Steinberg, Assmannshausen and other state holdings
late_tastings.tip: Late afternoon is the calmest tasting window; the abbey shop self-pour station lets you flight Steinberg trocken against the GG without booking.
late_tastings.description: Hessische Staatsweingueter vinothek inside the 12th-century Kloster Eberbach abbey, with self-pour and counter tastings of the Steinberg and Assmannshausen ranges.

late_tastings.name: Schloss Vollrads Vinothek
late_tastings.wine_program: The estate vinothek of moated Schloss Vollrads, pouring the estate dry Riesling range for counter tasting alongside an extensive estate-direct shop
late_tastings.tip: Combine the vinothek tasting with a stroll around the moated castle; the estate runs guided cellar tours on weekend afternoons.
late_tastings.description: Estate vinothek of moated Schloss Vollrads in Oestrich-Winkel, pouring the estate dry Riesling range for counter tasting alongside an estate-direct shop.

late_tastings.name: Weingut Leitz Vinothek Ruedesheim
late_tastings.wine_program: Johannes Leitz's estate vinothek in central Ruedesheim, pouring the steep Berg Schlossberg, Berg Roseneck and Berg Rottland dry Rieslings for tasting
late_tastings.tip: The Berg trio is the headline tasting flight; ask the staff to set the three steep-slope Rieslings side by side.
late_tastings.description: Johannes Leitz's central Ruedesheim vinothek, pouring the steep Berg Schlossberg, Berg Roseneck and Berg Rottland dry Rieslings for counter tasting.

sparkling_rooms.name: Schloss VAUX Eltville
sparkling_rooms.address: Kiedricher Strasse 18a, 65343 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: A traditional-method Sekt house in Eltville pouring Riesling and Spaetburgunder Sekt from Rheingau base wines, with cellar tours and counter tastings of the Sekt range
sparkling_rooms.tip: Book the cellar tour to see the riddling racks; the traditional-method Riesling Sekt is the headline pour.
sparkling_rooms.description: Traditional-method Sekt house in Eltville pouring Riesling and Spaetburgunder Sekt from Rheingau base wines, with cellar tours and Sekt tastings.

sparkling_rooms.name: Weinguter Wegeler Sektmanufaktur
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: The Wegeler estate sparkling-wine programme in Oestrich-Winkel, pouring Riesling and Pinot Sekt from estate base wines for tasting in the vinothek
sparkling_rooms.tip: Pair the Sekt flight with the still Geheimrat J Riesling to see the estate's two faces side by side.
sparkling_rooms.description: Wegeler estate sparkling-wine programme in Oestrich-Winkel, pouring Riesling and Pinot Sekt from estate base wines in the vinothek.

sparkling_rooms.name: Weingut Kuenstler Sekt Vinothek
sparkling_rooms.wine_program: Gunter Kuenstler's Hochheim estate vinothek pouring traditional-method Riesling Sekt alongside the dry Riesling range, in the estate house on the Geheimrat-Hummel-Platz
sparkling_rooms.tip: The Kuenstler Riesling Sekt brut is the estate's quiet specialty; ask for it alongside the Hochheimer Hoelle trocken.
sparkling_rooms.description: Gunter Kuenstler's Hochheim estate vinothek pouring traditional-method Riesling Sekt alongside the dry Riesling range from the warmer Main-side slopes.
